projects.title: Mudgeeraba SC - 2026 Gameday Collection
projects.description: A full matchday content system built for Mudgeeraba SC's 2026 season — lineup graphics, result graphics, and Player of the Match templates, all pulling from one consistent visual design. Backed by a running series of premium gameday posters, so every post lands with the same polished, professional look. Built to bring a more premium feel to the club's socials all season long.
